series_metadata.series_description: This series documents referrals from hospital staff that identifies Medicaid recipients who are using Emergency Room (ER) Services inappropriately. Recipients may be evaluated for enrollment in the Client Medical Management Program to reduce ER use.

retention_rules.trigger_event: in agency , records Records Center, Library of Virginia. in Records Center 2 years. Total retention 3 years, in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the reporting and tracking of Medicaid recipients who have been identified as using ER Services inappropriately.

retention_rules.trigger_event: entry last activity, delete from database
